creator: alster@vinterdalen.se
text:
Hi Zsolt,

Sorry for the delay: I was rebuilding all the poudriere jails after last SA and EN updates to be able to re-test the port in the latest possible environment to answer your question most precisely.

Unfortunately, the bug is still here: none of my i386 builds (for 13.3, 14.0 and 14.1) was successful and I still have no guess how it may be fixed. I just don't understand how it should work.

Open to hear any ideas on what could help.
